arts.ttl: Manchester City ‘even more serious’ about player – Contact made to beat PL rivals
arts.sum: Last weekend, Sky Deutschland journalist Florian Plettenberg stated Manchester City have entered the race for Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson and held initial talks. Manchester City signed Omar Marmoush from the Bundesliga club in January and plan to return in the summer window for the midfielder. Bild state Manchester City have ‘already expressed’ interest in the The post Manchester City ‘even more serious’ about player – Contact made to beat PL rivals appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'battling' Barcelona for La Liga star as £16.7m offer 'is prepared'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City allegedly join Barcelona in the race for Rayo Vallecano's Andrei Ratiu during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola told he is 'clueless on Man City bench' by ex-Arsenal footballer
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has been told by an Arsenal legend that certain tactics have made him look "clueless" amid the club's struggles for form this season

arts.ttl: Man City line-up vs Leicester predicted with Erling Haaland replacement clear and Nico O'Reilly call made
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Leicester City at the Etihad tonight with Erling Haaland sidelined

arts.ttl: Jeremy Monga Leicester City game-time stance set out by Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Fifteen-year-old starlet Jeremy Monga can make an impact for Leicester City in the short term – but manager Ruud van Nistelrooy will resist calls for him to feature this season. While City can offer Monga terms, he cannot sign a professional contract until he turns 17, which will be in July 2026.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sides with Jose Mourinho's infamous Man United quote after City struggles
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has opened up on how his side have had to cope without a number of key players throughout the season as they look to secure a top-four spot

arts.ttl: Inside King Power Stadium as owners get 'pump money' review
arts.sum: Speaking of Leuven, striker Nathan Opoku appears to be getting close to a return after breaking his leg on loan at the Belgian club at the end of last season. Needing to overturn a gap of nine points with nine games to go is out of the question for a good portion of the fanbase, and there have been subtle suggestions from Ruud van Nistelrooy that he feels the same.

arts.ttl: Manchester City Predicted Lineup vs. Leicester City
arts.sum: Manchester City will be without Erling Haaland against the Foxes as the Norwegian striker recovers from an ankle injury.

arts.ttl: Man City injury news and return dates as Blues handed triple boost after Haaland blow
arts.sum: Manchester City will hope to take a near-full squad to the FIFA Club World Cup as their injury list shortens towards the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges latest amid verdict confusion and timescale uncertainty
arts.sum: A decision on Manchester City's battle with the Premier League has yet to be delivered
